{
  Sample.OrderNotificationHandler.EventHandler.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

namespace Sample
{
    /// <summary>Generated Orleans grain interface for OrderNotificationHandler.</summary>
    public partial interface IOrderNotificationHandler : global::Edict.Core.Idempotency.IEdictEventConsumer
    {
    }

    [global::Orleans.ImplicitStreamSubscriptionAttribute("Orders")]
    public partial class OrderNotificationHandler : IOrderNotificationHandler
    {
        protected override bool HandlesType(
            global::Edict.Contracts.Events.EdictEvent edictEvent)
        {
            return edictEvent switch
            {
                global::Sample.OrderCancelledEvent => true,
                global::Sample.OrderPlacedEvent => true,
                _ => false,
            };
        }

        protected override async global::System.Threading.Tasks.Task<bool> DispatchAsync(
            global::Edict.Contracts.Events.EdictEvent edictEvent)
        {
            switch (edictEvent)
            {
                case global::Sample.OrderCancelledEvent typed:
                {
                    await DispatchEventAsync(typed, HandleAsync);
                    return true;
                }
                case global::Sample.OrderPlacedEvent typed:
                {
                    await DispatchEventAsync(typed, HandleAsync);
                    return true;
                }
                default:
                    return false;
            }
        }
    }
}

}
